safety_use_cases.label: Pedestrian entry monitoring in restricted area
safety_use_cases.description: Monitor for any pedestrians entering a no-pedestrian-access zone inside the barriers.

evidence.quote: As an area where, like, there's no pedestrian access there, so that would be the only thing you monitor, plus, I mean, maybe that fence that, that's Australian Border Force over that fence, so it's very unlikely somebody's going to come over that fence, if they're coming over that fence, they've probably got Border Force people chasing them, but I'd have to go back over there.
evidence.speaker: Perry Everett <fake.perry.everett@vectortransitlogistics.com>

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Perimeter fence intrusion/security monitoring
